title: TTD Rallies on OpenAI Partnership Talks, Stock Still 80% Below Record High
description:
A huge really lifted the Trade Desk (TTD) on Thursday thanks to a new reported partnership with OpenAI. Shares still trade more than 65% under its 52-week high and more than 80% off its all-time high. Rick Ducat shows how stark the company's underperformance has been to its software peers even in the midst of a market SaaS-acre and show the heavy options activity that took place in Thursday's session.

title: The Trade Desk, Inc. (TTD): ProgrammaticвАЩs Neutral King
description:
On this episode of Stock Spotlight, Michael dives into The Trade Desk ($TTD), the demand-side platform at the heart of programmatic advertising. With deep integrations, a founder-led culture and a commitment to neutrality in a world of walled gardens, TTD has become the go-to tool for agencies and brands navigating the open internet.

But even a king has its challenges. Despite strong free cash flow, high gross margins and tailwinds from CTV and digital spend, The Trade Desk faces valuation risk
